## Author checklist

- [ ] The diff is limited to the linked Issue.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are demonstrably complete.
- [ ] Tests cover success, failure and authorization paths where relevant.
- [ ] No secrets, temporary output, local data or generated diagnostics are committed.
- [ ] Documentation/status/ADR changes are included when required.
- [ ] A separate reviewer has been requested.
